overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character in period clothing walking through a historic city at night. The scene features wet cobblestone streets illuminated by warm gas lamps, with brick buildings and wrought iron balconies lining the route.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk past various storefronts including a liquor store

entered.detail: iron and wood awning covering the pedestrian walkway
vertical painted sign reading LIQUORS on the building facade
two-story brick building with green shutters and wrought iron balcony
cast iron street lamp with warm yellow glow
stacked wooden boxes and barrels outside the storefronts

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk beneath an iron awning, passing brick buildings with gas lamps illuminating the wet pavement. Storefront signs for liquor and cigars are visible on the right as the character moves steadily forward.

events.description: character stops walking and stands near a doorway with a poster
character turns left at the intersection onto a new street

agents.ego_description: pauses near a doorway to look around, then crosses the muddy intersection toward the corner building

entered.detail: prominent corner building with lit windows and ornate facade
wet cobblestone street crossing with puddles reflecting lamplight

segments.scene_description: The character stops near a doorway, then proceeds to cross the open intersection toward a well-lit corner building. The covered sidewalk gives way to an exposed cobblestone street as the character turns left onto a new thoroughfare.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with gas lamps

agents.ego_description: walking down the open muddy street between rows of historic buildings with wrought iron balconies

entered.detail: continuous row of two-story historic buildings with balconies and shuttered windows
brick facades with ornate iron railings on upper floors
faint glow of street lamps receding into the foggy distance

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a narrow cobblestone street lined with historic buildings on both sides. Warm gas lamps cast long shadows across the wet pavement as the street stretches into the misty distance.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes from right to left across the path
character turns right onto a covered sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza as a carriage passes, then turning onto the right-side sidewalk

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving from right to left across the path

entered.detail: wooden carriage with two horses and driver passing through the plaza
line of trees visible at the edge of the open area

segments.scene_description: The character enters a more open plaza area where a horse-drawn carriage passes by. Trees become visible in the distance as the city buildings recede, and the character turns right onto another covered sidewalk.

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk passing NPCs sitting against the brick wall

notable_agents.action: man sitting against the brick wall near a doorway
person sitting on a chair near a wooden bench

entered.detail: wooden and iron awning providing cover over the walkway
exposed brick wall of the building with doorways
simple wooden bench placed against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk where several NPCs are sitting against the brick wall. The wooden awning overhead provides shelter as the character passes doorways and a wooden bench.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a historic city at night, transitioning from sheltered sidewalks to open intersections and back into covered walkways. It begins beneath an iron awning where gas lamps illuminate wet pavement and storefront signs for liquor and cigars, before the character steps out from the cover to cross an open cobblestone intersection. The scene then shifts as the camera follows the character down a narrow, misty street lined with historic buildings and long shadows, eventually opening into a plaza where a horse-drawn carriage passes by. As the city buildings recede and distant trees become visible, the camera turns right to enter another sheltered area. Finally, the movement concludes along a brick wall beneath a wooden awning, passing by seated NPCs and a wooden bench.
